About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various posts in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

The UPSSSC was established to provide a transparent and fair recruitment process for government jobs in the state.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment 2026 is a government job recruitment program aimed at filling 2759 posts in the Technical Assistant Group C category.

The program is designed to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the state of Uttar Pradesh.
